name: mettle-syntax
description: Syntax highlighting, editing support, snippets, and compiler-backed diagnostics for Mettle (.mettle).

mettle.linter.compilerEnabled.description: Run the Mettle compiler on save for semantic diagnostics.
mettle.linter.compilerEnabled.markdownDescription:
When enabled, the extension runs the `mettle` compiler on open/save and shows compiler errors and warnings in the Problems panel. Fast syntax checks still run while you type.

Requires a `mettle` binary from workspace `bin/`, a configured path, or `PATH`.

mettle.linter.compilerPath.description: Path to the mettle executable. Empty: auto-detect workspace bin/, then PATH.
mettle.linter.compilerPath.markdownDescription:
Path to the Mettle executable. Can be relative to the workspace folder or absolute.

If empty, the extension looks for `bin/mettle` or `bin/mettle.exe` under the workspace and parent folders, then uses `mettle` / `mettle.exe` on `PATH`.

mettle.linter.stdlibPath.description: Optional --stdlib directory override for the linter invocation.
mettle.linter.stdlibPath.markdownDescription:
If set, passed to the compiler as `--stdlib <dir>` when linting. Use when you maintain a custom standard library layout.

Leave empty to use the compiler's default bundled stdlib resolution.

mettle.linter.extraIncludePaths.description: Additional include directories passed as -I when compiler diagnostics run.
mettle.linter.extraIncludePaths.markdownDescription: Additional include directories passed as `-I <dir>` when compiler diagnostics run. Relative paths resolve from the workspace folder.

mettle.linter.compilerTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for one compiler diagnostics run.
